column1: The Company presently has 8 main branches/business locations, 1 e-branch and 31 offsite locations powered
by a hybrid of solar and conventional energy supply (grid and diesel generators). These branches have ATMs
and communication devices powered by solar panels. We currently have 59 ATMs powered by alternative
sources of energy (solar energy). There were no significant negative environmental and social impacts issues
reported on any of our branches or projects financed.
